calendar.matters:
Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Reconsider The Court'S Order Granting Dedts' Demurrer To Pltf'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CAROLINE LIVAI'S Motion To Reconsider The Court'S Order Granting Defendant's Demurrer To Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kevin Gilbert, Esq. of Meyer Nave, et al, 510-808-2000 for defendant and moving party San Francisco Unified School District
David Yen, Esq. and Robert Cartwright, Esq. of The Cartwright Law Firm 415-433-0444 for plaintiff and opposing party Caroline Livai

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, A COMPLAINT AGAINST THE WRONG ENTITY CANNOT TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION AS TO A SEPERATE ENTITY. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/ER)
